# OpenSource Media

## What is OpenSource Media?
OpenSource Media (OSM) is a media and events company focused on the new economy — AI, crypto, DeFi, and open systems. Founded by JC Lopez, OSM operates as the townsquare for builders of the new economy.

## What does OSM do?
- **Live Builder Forums**: Weekly 60-minute live streamed conversations on X featuring 3-4 builders debating topics across DeFi, AI agents, tokenized economies, and open-source protocols.
- **Virtual Conferences**: World-class virtual conferences open for everyone. OSM produced "Solana Breakout" (Feb 10-12, 2026) with 15+ speakers, 350,000+ attendees, and 24+ hours of live content across 3 days.
- **Builder Network**: A curated network of founders, researchers, and operators building across the new economy.

## Key Facts
- Website: https://opensourcemedia.xyz
- X/Twitter: @opensourcexyz
- YouTube: @opensourcemediaxyz
- Show: "Builders of the Open Economy" — weekly live forum on X
- Next Event: OSM Virtual Conference, August 2026, 5 days, 30+ speakers
- Previous Event: Solana Breakout, Feb 10-12 2026, 350K+ attendees

## Contact
- Sponsor inquiries: jc@opensourcemedia.xyz
